ALT_FILE_EXT.title: This alt text is a filename, not a description

ALT_MAYBE_BAD.title: Is this a clear and concise description of the image?

ALT_MAYBE_BAD_WARNING.title: Is this a clear and concise description of the image?

ALT_PLACEHOLDER.title: This alt text may be a placeholder

ARIA_INPUT_FIELD_NAME.title: This custom input field is missing a label

BTN_EMPTY.title: Button is missing an accessible label

BTN_EMPTY_LABELLEDBY.title: Button has an invalid ARIA label

CONTRAST_ERROR.title: Text does not have enough contrast to be easily legible

CONTRAST_ERROR_GRAPHIC.title: Graphic or icon does not have enough contrast

CONTRAST_INPUT.title: Input does not provide enough contrast to be easily legible

CONTRAST_PLACEHOLDER.title: Placeholder text does not have enough contrast to be easily legible

CONTRAST_PLACEHOLDER_UNSUPPORTED.title: Does this placeholder text have enough contrast?

CONTRAST_WARNING.title: Does this text have enough contrast?

CONTRAST_WARNING_GRAPHIC.title: Does this graphic or icon have enough contrast?

DUPLICATE_TITLE.title: This link has a tooltip with the same text as the link

EMBED_AUDIO.title: Does this audio have a transcript?

EMBED_UNFOCUSABLE.title: Frame with tabindex="-1" will not be keyboard accessible.

HEADING_EMPTY_WITH_IMAGE.title: This image is used as a heading, so it needs alt text

HEADING_FIRST.title: The first heading on this page is a subheading

HEADING_MISSING_ONE.title: This page is missing a Heading 1

HEADING_SKIPPED_LEVEL.title: This heading is tagged at the wrong level

HIDDEN_FOCUSABLE.title: This element cannot be described by screen readers

IMAGE_ALT_TOO_LONG.title: Can this alt text be shorter?

IMAGE_DECORATIVE_CAROUSEL.title: Image in a carousel or gallery marked as decorative

IMAGE_FIGURE_DECORATIVE.title: This captioned image has no alt text

IMAGE_FIGURE_DUPLICATE_ALT.title: Alt text should not be the same as caption text

LABELS_ARIA_LABEL_INPUT.title: Is there a visible label for this field?

LABELS_MISSING_IMAGE_INPUT.title: This image input is missing alt text

LABELS_MISSING_LABEL.title: This input has an empty label

LABELS_NO_FOR_ATTRIBUTE.title: This input is not connected to a label

LABEL_IN_NAME.title: Visible label does not match invisible label

LANG_MISMATCH.title: Language tag does not match the content

LANG_OF_PARTS.title: This content appears to be in a different language

LANG_OF_PARTS_ALT.title: This alt text appears to be in a different language

LINK_ALT_FILE_EXT.title: Alt text used as a link should not be a URL

LINK_ALT_MAYBE_BAD.title: This linked alt might not be clear and concise

LINK_ALT_MAYBE_BAD_WARNING.title: This linked alt might not be clear and concise

LINK_ALT_UNPRONOUNCEABLE.title: Linked images need pronounceable alt text

LINK_DOI.title: Link article titles, not DOI numbers

LINK_FILE_EXT.title: Link points to a file without warning

LINK_IDENTICAL_NAME.title: Links with the same text link to different pages

LINK_IMAGE_ALT.title: Does this alt text describe the link or the image?

LINK_IMAGE_ALT_AND_TEXT.title: Does this alt text make sense as part of this link?

LINK_IMAGE_LONG_ALT.title: Can this linked alt text be shorter?

LINK_IMAGE_NO_ALT_TEXT.title: This linked image needs alt text

LINK_IMAGE_TEXT.title: Does this linked image need a description?

LINK_MAYBE_BUTTON.title: Is this link actually a button?

LINK_NEW_TAB.title: Does this link open a new tab without warning?

LINK_PLACEHOLDER_ALT.title: This linked alt text may be a placeholder

LINK_STOPWORD.title: This link only contains generic words

LINK_STOPWORD_ARIA.title: The purpose of this link is visually hidden

LINK_SUS_ALT.title: Does this image's alt describe the image or the link?

LINK_SYMBOLS.title: Are the symbols or emoji in this link meaningful?

LINK_URL.title: Link text should not be a URL

META_LANG.title: Meta tag for page language missing

META_LANG_SUGGEST.title: Did you mean a different language code?

META_TITLE.title: Meta tag for page title missing

PAGE_LANG_CONFIDENCE.title: Page language may not match the content

SUS_ALT.title: Are there redundant words in this alt text?
